## Summary

- explain the change briefly
- explain the main risk
- explain how it was validated

## Title Convention

PR titles in this repo are mandatory and must follow:

```text
<emoji> <type>(<scope optional>): <description>
```

Example:

```text
✨ feat(test-harness): add pester foundation for bootstrap config
```

## Validation

- [ ] local lint executed
- [ ] local tests executed
- [ ] docs updated when needed
- [ ] risks and follow-ups noted
